title: 12 Jyotirlingas of India – How Many Do You Know?
description:
These are the 12 sacred Jyotirlingas of India, dedicated to Lord Shiva—spread from the Himalayas to the southern coast.

From Kedarnath Temple and Kashi Vishwanath Temple
to Somnath Temple and Ramanathaswamy Temple—each holds deep spiritual significance.

Did you know Maharashtra alone has three Jyotirlingas?

How many have you visited? Comment below 👇
Follow for more such content on India’s culture, history, and hidden gems.
